## Return Value

The generated private key.

## Discussion

Give the [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/KEMPrivateKey/publicKey-swift.property] to another person so that they can encapsulate shared secrets that you recover by calling [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/KEMPrivateKey/decapsulate(_:)].

# generate()

**Type Method**

Generates a new random private key.

## Declaration

```swift
static func generate() throws -> Self
```

## Return Value

The generated private key.

## Discussion

Give the [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/KEMPrivateKey/publicKey-swift.property] to another person so that they can encapsulate shared secrets that you recover by calling [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/KEMPrivateKey/decapsulate(_:)].
title: generate()
